name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: davidesidoti

---

Thanks for helping improve unit3dprep!

**Before submitting:**
- Search [existing issues](https://github.com/davidesidoti/unit3dprep/issues?q=is%3Aissue) to avoid duplicates
- If this is a bug, use the "Bug report" template instead

---

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Describe the real use case. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How do you imagine the feature should work? -->

## Affected area

<!-- Pick ONE -->

- [ ] Auth / login
- [ ] Media Library (scan, categories, accordion)
- [ ] Upload Wizard
- [ ] Quick Upload
- [ ] unit3dup integration
- [ ] Hardlink / seedings
- [ ] TMDB integration
- [ ] Tracker clients (new tracker or existing config)
- [ ] qBittorrent client
- [ ] Settings / runtime config
- [ ] Logs tab
- [ ] Mobile UI / responsive
- [ ] i18n (new language, translations)
- [ ] Update flow
- [ ] systemd / deploy
- [ ] API (new endpoints)
- [ ] Frontend (components, routing, UX)
- [ ] Documentation (MkDocs)
- [ ] Developer experience (build, test, CI)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Scope

- [ ] Small (a few lines, single component/endpoint)
- [ ] Medium (new component + endpoint, touches FE+BE)
- [ ] Large (new UI section, refactor, new external integration)
- [ ] Not sure

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them -->

## Mockups / examples / references

<!-- Screenshots, links to similar UIs in other tools, sketches. Drag images here. -->

## API / data impact (if relevant)

<!--
New endpoints? Modifies existing payloads? New fields in Unit3Dbot.json or DB?
Breaking changes for existing consumers?
-->

## Configuration impact (if relevant)

<!-- New U3DP_*/W_* env vars? New keys in Unit3Dbot.json? Backwards-compatible defaults? -->

## i18n impact (if UI feature)

<!-- New strings? Translation needed in frontend/src/i18n/locales/{en,it}.ts + backend unit3dprep/i18n.py? -->

## Willing to contribute a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can implement it
- [ ] Yes, but I need guidance on the design
- [ ] No, proposal only

## Additional context

<!-- Links to discussions, related issues, timing/priority -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues/PRs and found no similar proposals
- [ ] I described the problem before the solution (not just "I want X")
